response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with diverse project experience, including AI-agent infrastructure and open-source contributions. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep AI strategy expertise and 15 years of experience, where the candidate falls short in seniority and lacks explicit evidence of AI-driven product leadership or cloud strategy at scale.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source projects
Entrepreneurial mindset with founder experience and workshop leadership
concerns: Only ~12 years of experience (below the 15-year requirement)
Limited explicit evidence of AI strategy or cloud product leadership
No advanced degree in AI or related field
